expectations.text: for_loop_used: A for / end loop drives mass and/or spring-damper creation
expectations.evidence: Two 'for ... end' loops present: one (i=1..8) for point masses, one (j=1..7) for spring-dampers

expectations.text: eval_function_used: EVAL() used to dereference a variable inside a command string
expectations.evidence: EVAL() used throughout both loops, e.g. (eval(".chain_masses.mass_" // RTOI(i))) and (eval(.chain_masses.stiffness))

expectations.text: rtoi_function_used: RTOI() used to convert the loop counter to a string for name construction
expectations.evidence: RTOI(i) and RTOI(j) used in both loops, e.g. '.chain_masses.mass_' // RTOI(i)

expectations.text: string_concat_operator_used: // string concatenation operator used to build part/marker names
expectations.evidence: // used to assemble names such as ".chain_masses.mass_" // RTOI(i) // ".cm"

expectations.text: point_mass_type_used: Masses created with part create point_mass (not rigid_body)
expectations.evidence: 'part create point_mass name_and_position' used in the mass loop

expectations.text: spring_damper_created: Spring-dampers created with force create element_like translational_spring_damper with stiffness=100, damping=1.0, displacement_at_preload=50
expectations.evidence: force create element_like translational_spring_damper with stiffness=(eval(.chain_masses.stiffness)) [=100], damping=(eval(.chain_masses.damping)) [=1.0], displacement_at_preload=(eval(.chain_masses.free_len)) [=50.0]

expectations.text: first_mass_fixed_to_ground: First mass (mass_1) is constrained to ground with a spherical joint (NOT a fixed joint)

expectations.evidence: for loop runs start_value=1 end_value=(eval(.chain_masses.n_mass)) where n_mass=8.0, creating mass_1 through mass_8

expectations.text: 50mm_spacing: Masses are spaced 50 mm apart along the X axis
simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: 'simulation single_run transient ... end_time=2.0 number_of_steps=2000' present at end of script

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use fully qualified paths like .chain_masses.mass_1, .chain_masses.ground.anchor_mkr, .chain_masses.sph_fix, etc.

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: Regex search for 'adams_id' (case-insensitive) returned no matches

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (sphere or cylinder) added to each mass
expectations.evidence: 'geometry create shape ellipsoid' created for each mass inside the loop with x/y/z_scale_factor=8.0

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: 0 ERROR: lines found in aview.log; log ends with 'batch run is finished' and 'Finished -----'
